    {α : Type*} [MeasurableSpace α] (μ : Measure α)
    {grad_u grad_u_neg : α → ℝ}
    (h : ∀ x, grad_u x * grad_u_neg x = - (grad_u_neg x) ^ 2) :
    ∫ x, grad_u x * grad_u_neg x ∂μ = - ∫ x, (grad_u_neg x) ^ 2 ∂μ
